place.summary: K11 MUSEA functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Victoria Harbour. Visitors often continue to Victoria Harbour. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Victoria Harbour
opportunity_cards.detail: K11 MUSEA frequently appears alongside Victoria Harbour, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to The Peninsula
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from K11 MUSEA to The Peninsula, with relatively strong journey experience.
